description: As a project nears completion, a document controller must assemble the final handover package of all drawings, manuals, and certificates for the client.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all required handover documents from the project plan.

expected_outcome.value: The system generates a checklist of all required documents.

nodes.task_description: For each item on the checklist, retrieve the final approved version from the document management system.

expected_outcome.value: The agent gathers all the final documents.

nodes.task_description: Compile all the documents into a single, structured handover package and transmit it to the client.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the final documentation package and formally transmits it.
